_doc: KNOWLEDGE-AS-CIRCUITS registry — the machine-readable form of our error-patterns / lessons / design-rules / library best-practices. Each entry is a HARD mechanical circuit run by scripts/run-circuits.mjs. Add one whenever a lesson/pattern qualifies (repeat error, red-line, or a library best-practice collision). Never weaken a circuit to make code pass; fix the code. Seeded with a few real circuits — the librarian/harness appends the rest (loop-work).

circuits.source: ledger #77 sqlx bind/decode class + integer-money invariant (ADR-rust-money-newtype)
circuits.message: The sovereign money core must be integer-only (Lek(i64)); no float type may appear. Read money as ::bigint -> i64.
Raw `any` erases type safety (banned class). Use a real type or `unknown` + narrowing.
process.exit() kills the process mid-flight (no cleanup). Throw/return an error to the caller instead.

circuits.source: RLS FORCE red-line invariant (owner-active membership, ADR-0004)
circuits.message: A table with ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY must also FORCE it (table owners/BYPASSRLS bypass ENABLE-only RLS).

circuits.source: fable-audit finding #5 — loops reference REMOVED proxy machinery (council/invariant-guardian/security-sentinel/serious-gate/design-council deleted by the §0·GP purge f1255ad5)
circuits.message: This loop spec references REMOVED machinery (council / invariant-guardian / security-sentinel / serious-gate / design-council). Those proxy gates were deleted (§0·GP ground-truth-over-proxy). Escalate to the deterministic gates / a human, not a removed proxy.

circuits.source: fable-audit finding #5 — skills reference REMOVED proxy machinery
circuits.message: This skill references REMOVED machinery (council / invariant-guardian / security-sentinel / serious-gate / design-council) — deleted by the §0·GP purge. Point to the deterministic gates / a human instead.
